stories.title: docker-compose: mount missing DB init scripts 05 and 06
acceptanceCriteria: postgres volumes section includes 05-ingestion-jobs.sql mounted as /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/05-ingestion-jobs.sql
postgres volumes section includes 06-privacy-levels.sql mounted as /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/06-privacy-levels.sql

stories.title: docker-compose: add required env vars to web service
acceptanceCriteria: web service environment has DATABASE_URL using postgres:5432 (not localhost)
web service environment has BETTER_AUTH_SECRET, BETTER_AUTH_URL, ENCRYPTION_KEY
web service environment has EDGEQUAKE_URL=http://edgequake:8080
web service environment has AI_SERVER_URL=http://ai-server:4000
web service does NOT have mismatched NEXT_PUBLIC_EDGEQUAKE_URL

stories.title: docker-compose: add ocr-server service
acceptanceCriteria: docker-compose has an ocr-server service built from apps/ai-server/ocr-server using Dockerfile.ocr
ocr-server exposes port 8000 internally and is on sayknowmind network
ai-server depends_on includes ocr-server

stories.title: docker-compose: add Redis service and REDIS_URL to ai-server
acceptanceCriteria: docker-compose has redis service using redis:7-alpine
ai-server environment has REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379
ai-server depends_on includes redis

stories.title: install.sh: fix DATABASE_URL to use postgres container hostname
acceptanceCriteria: install.sh generates DATABASE_URL with hostname 'postgres' not 'localhost'
pattern: postgres://postgres:${PG_PASSWORD}@postgres:5432/sayknowmind

stories.title: Root Makefile with convenience targets
acceptanceCriteria: Makefile exists at project root
make up, make down, make logs, make status, make build, make clean targets all defined
stories.evidence: Makefile already existed with all required targets

stories.title: Create docker/searxng/settings.yml for production SearXNG
acceptanceCriteria: docker/searxng/settings.yml exists with secret_key placeholder and general/web search enabled
docker-compose searxng service mounts docker/searxng/settings.yml to /etc/searxng/settings.yml:ro

stories.title: TypeScript build passes with 0 errors after all changes
acceptanceCriteria: npx tsc --noEmit in apps/web exits with code 0, 0 errors
stories.evidence: npx tsc --noEmit exits 0 — no output (zero errors)
